description:
Create a permission group named 'Regulatory Auditors' for regulatory auditors in the Django admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using credentials admin/adminpass123. The group must contain exactly the following six view-only permissions and no add, change, or delete permissions:
1. registry | aircraft | Can view aircraft
2. registry | contact | Can view contact
3. registry | operator | Can view operator
4. registry | person | Can view person
5. gcs_operations | flight operation | Can view flight operation
6. gcs_operations | flight plan | Can view flight plan
